form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at Ballarat over 390m (22.52) beating Yellow Ochre in Grade 5 on April 6. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 8 over 300m at Healesville behind Jams Donuts beaten 5.5 lengths (17.22) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
